title: Kintsugi
content: The Japanese have this concept called kintsugi - repairing broken pottery with gold, making the cracks part of the beauty. I learned that living in Japan for almost a decade. Our failures, our cracks... they're not things to hide. They're part of what makes us valuable.
ssml_content: The Japanese have this concept called kintsugi - repairing broken pottery with gold, making the cracks part of the beauty. <break time="300ms"/>I learned that living in Japan for almost a decade. Our failures, our cracks... they're not things to hide. They're part of what makes us valuable.
teaching_point: Our imperfections are part of our value
